Scheme: HDFC Large Cap Fund | Section: FAQs
AMC / RTA’s branches i.e. Investor Services Centres*
HDFC MF website and App/ RTA website for Investors to transact
MFSS/BSE StAR MF/NMF II platforms of the Stock Exchanges(s)
Authorized Points of Service of MF Utilities India Private Limited (MFUI)
Channel partners/ Distributors/ RIAs/ Portfolio Managers/Execution Only Platforms (EOPs) who have tied up with the AMC
MF Central
* Note: Business Centres i.e. Sales offices of HDFC AMC are not Official Points of Acceptance of transactions.
